message:
perf(stats): bail in quiet mode before building output context

Hoists the existing `OutputMode::Quiet` short-circuit above the call
to `stats_output_context(...)`. The function does additional work to
construct the rendering context (resolving column lists, terminal
width, color policy, JSON vs table dispatch state, etc.), which is
wasted when quiet mode is going to discard all output anyway. The
earlier exit point uses `early_ctx.mode()` (already computed before
breakdowns / activity gathering above) so no extra work is introduced.

Pairs with the earlier "skip recent-activity collection in quiet output
mode" change to make `br stats --quiet` allocate as little as possible
on the way to the no-op return.
